avalancheActivity.comment:
Especially adjacent to ridgelines and in gullies and bowls: The fresh snow as well as all the wind slabs can be released by a single winter sport participant.
Backcountry touring calls for careful route selection.

In steep rocky terrain and on sunny slopes occasionally large natural avalanches are possible as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.
avalancheActivity.highlights: In some localities increase in avalanche danger as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.

regions.name: B - VALLI DI GRESSONEY, AYAS, CHAMPORCHER

snowpackStructure.comment:
20 to 30 cm of snow, and up to 50 cm in some localities, fell on Sunday. Especially in the areas bordering Piedmont. The wind was light to moderate adjacent to ridgelines.

Over a wide area new snow is lying on the soft surface of an old snowpack. Or on crusts.
Towards its surface, the snowpack is weak in some cases; its surface consists of faceted crystals. Weak layers exist in the snowpack in particular on steep shady slopes.
Especially adjacent to ridgelines in all aspects: Over a wide area snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind.

tendency.highlights: The weather conditions will facilitate a gradual strengthening of the near-surface layers in particular on sunny slopes.

avalancheActivity.comment:
Especially adjacent to ridgelines and in gullies and bowls: The fresh snow as well as all the wind slabs can be released by a single winter sport participant.
Backcountry touring calls for careful route selection.

In steep rocky terrain and on sunny slopes medium-sized and, in isolated cases, large natural avalanches are possible as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.
avalancheActivity.highlights: In some localities increase in avalanche danger as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.

snowpackStructure.comment:
20 to 30 cm of snow, and even more in some localities, fell on Sunday. The wind was light to moderate adjacent to ridgelines.

Over a wide area new snow is lying on the soft surface of an old snowpack. Or on crusts.
Towards its surface, the snowpack is weak in some cases; its surface consists of faceted crystals. Weak layers exist in the snowpack in particular on steep shady slopes.
Especially adjacent to ridgelines in all aspects: Over a wide area snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind.

tendency.highlights: The weather conditions will facilitate a gradual strengthening of the near-surface layers in particular on sunny slopes.

avalancheActivity.comment:
In steep rocky terrain and on very steep sunny slopes small and, in isolated cases, medium-sized natural avalanches are possible as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.

Especially adjacent to ridgelines and in gullies and bowls: The fresh snow of Sunday and all the wind slabs can be released by a single winter sport participant in some cases. This applies in particular on very steep shady slopes.
avalancheActivity.highlights: In some localities increase in avalanche danger as a consequence of warming during the day and solar radiation.

snowpackStructure.comment:
5 to 15 cm of snow fell on Sunday. The wind was light to moderate adjacent to ridgelines.

Over a wide area new snow is lying on the soft surface of an old snowpack. Or on crusts.
Towards its surface, the snowpack is weak in some cases; its surface consists of faceted crystals. Weak layers exist in the snowpack in particular on steep shady slopes.
Especially adjacent to ridgelines in all aspects: Over a wide area snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind.

tendency.highlights: The weather conditions will facilitate a gradual strengthening of the near-surface layers in particular on sunny slopes.
